description: Manufactures semiconductor production equipment and precision measuring instruments. Core products: wafer probing machines (world #1, 46% global share), wafer dicing machines (~10% global share), CMP equipment, polish grinders, edge grinders, and precision dicing blades. Brand name: ACCRETECH. Two segments: SPE (74% of sales) and Metrology (26%). Revenue FY2025/3: 150.5B JPY. China sales ratio: 34%.

majorClients: Powertech Technology (CMP-0069) - dicing, probing (Taiwan memory OSAT)
Hua Hong Semiconductor (CMP-0070) - CMP, probing (China #2 foundry)
DB HiTek (CMP-0075) - probing, dicing, CMP (Korea #2 foundry, 200mm)
HANA Micron (CMP-0076) - probing, dicing (Korea #1 OSAT, global #8)
Nepes (CMP-0077) - probing, dicing (Korea OSAT, FO-PLP pioneer)
SFA Semicon (CMP-0078) - probing, dicing (Korea OSAT, Samsung backend)
LB Semicon (CMP-0079) - probing, dicing (Korea OSAT, DDI specialist)
Nexchip (CMP-0083) - probing, dicing, CMP (China #3 foundry, 12-inch DDIC)
CR Micro (CMP-0084) - probing, dicing (China IDM, power semi #1 domestic)
YMTC (CMP-0093) - CMP, probing, dicing (China NAND, pre-sanctions customer)
GTA Semiconductor (CMP-0095) - probing, dicing (Shanghai specialty foundry)
KYEC (CMP-0101) - probing, dicing (Taiwan, world #1 pure-play tester)
VSMC/Vanguard (CMP-0103) - CMP, probing, dicing (Taiwan specialty foundry)
Chipbond (CMP-0104) - probing, dicing (Taiwan OSAT, driver IC specialist)
GlobalFoundries (CMP-0106) - CMP, probing, dicing (Singapore fabs, world #3 foundry)
Unisem (CMP-0109) - probing, dicing (Malaysia OSAT, Huatian subsidiary)
competitors: Hanmi Semiconductor (CMP-0072) - packaging equipment (Korea, TC bonders)
NAURA/北方华创 (CMP-0085) - CMP, probe stations (China #1 semi equipment platform)
Changchuan/长川科技 (CMP-0087) - probe stations (China, 12-inch CP12-Memory in dev)
Huahai Qingke/华海清科 (CMP-0088) - CMP equipment (China #1 CMP, >50% domestic 12-inch share)
Heyan/和研科技 (CMP-0089) - dicing machines (China, first mass-produced domestic dicer)
CETC/烁科精微 (CMP-0091) - CMP + dicing (China state-owned, CETC subsidiary)
TSD/特思迪 (CMP-0092) - CMP, grinding (China, #1 in compound semi CMP)
SEMES (CMP-0096) - probing (Korea, Samsung subsidiary, SEMPRO PRIME)
SEMICS (CMP-0097) - probing (Korea, world #3 prober, Samsung 15yr supplier)
EO Technics (CMP-0099) - laser stealth dicing (Korea, alternative to blade dicing)
partners: Advantest (CMP-0005) - joint development of die-level prober for AI/HPC (announced Dec 2025)
_externalRelationships.notes: Together with DISCO, controls 90% of global dicing market. World #1 prober maker (46% share vs TEL 27%). China is 34% of sales. 28 subsidiaries in 18 countries. Regional offices: Accretech Korea (Dongtan), Accretech Taiwan (Hsinchu), Accretech China (Shanghai + 8 offices), Accretech Singapore, Accretech Malaysia (Selangor/Penang/Melaka/JB). Wave 5 analysis: 35 total identified clients across 7 countries, 15 competitors. Chinese domestic substitution is #1 strategic risk (CMP >50% lost, probing under pressure, dicing still defensible). Korean localization via SEMES/SEMICS/KCTech is #2 risk. Export controls restrict sales to Entity List companies but accelerate domestic substitution.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, CNBC, TradingView, Accretech IR, Nikkei, industry reports, Japanese/Chinese/Korean/English language research
_metadata.notes: Q3 FY2026/3 revenue: 112.97B JPY (+9.5% YoY). Full year FY2025/3 revenue: 150.5B JPY (+11.8%). 52-week range: 6,148-16,170 JPY. Brand name: ACCRETECH. Joint die-level prober development with Advantest announced Dec 2025. Wave 5: comprehensive CN/KR/APAC supply chain mapping.
